ECB adverse scenario: headline inflation projected at 3.3% in 2026
ECB mild outlook: inflation to hit 1.8% by 2028
ECB's mild scenario: inflation forecast at 1.8% in 2027
ECB mild scenario: foresees 2026 inflation at 2.9%
The UAE and Iran are said to have met face to face to ease tensions.
EU's Economy Commissioner Dombrovskis: The US needs to save more, China needs to consume more.
World Bank forecasts 2026 Euro area GDP growth at 0.8% vs 0.9% in January forecast, 1.4% in 2025.
World Bank cuts 2026 GDP growth forecast for the Middle East region to 1.6% vs 4.3% in the January forecast, 4% in 2025.
World Bank forecasts average Brent Crude prices at $94 per barrel in 2026, up $34 from January forecast
World Bank: Risks to the outlook for global growth and trade are substantial.
